text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's gone. I can't find it anywhere. 
My precious fountain pen is nowhere to be found…!!
choice_data_list: Where could I have dropped it…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: ――Um, is everything okay?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Are you looking for something?
choice_data_list: <size=40>Ah… I actually dropped my fountain pen</size>

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I passed my trainer certification exam――I splurged and bought it as 
a reward for myself, a symbol of my dream. It's a real treasure to me.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Something that important…!? 
This is an emergency. I'll help you look for it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I decided to retrace my steps one more time from the last place I used it, but…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Right… In that case, we know for sure that you used the fountain pen here and put it in your pocket.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: You went to the cafeteria next, right? Let's head there and check the hallway on the way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I searched every inch of the hallway. 
I even checked all around the cafeteria. But I still couldn't find it…
choice_data_list: <size=34>If we can't find it after looking this hard, I guess…</size>

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Please don't give up! It's something very, very precious to you, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure that fountain pen holds your dreams, your hard work, your memories… 
It must be filled with so many things.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: To just give up on it… Please don't say such sad things with that pained look on your face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ――She's right. The pride I felt when I bought it. The way it lifted my spirits every time I used it, acting as proof of my dream. …There's no way I can just give up on it.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
――Right? 
Let's keep looking until we find it.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah…! Isn't that it, Trainer!?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: There's a fountain pen lying over there!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
――! Thank goodness… 
Oh, thank goodneeeess…!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Buena Vista is just as happy as I am… No, perhaps even more so. She spent so much time helping me look for it so earnestly――
choice_data_list: <size=38>Thank you so much, you're a lifesaver!</size>
<size=38>Thank you so much, you're a lifesaver!</size>
<size=38>I'm sorry for taking up so much of your time…</size>
<size=38>I'm sorry for taking up so much of your time…</size>

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Buena Vista is just as happy as I am… No, perhaps even more so. She spent so much time helping me look for it so earnestly――
choice_data_list: <size=38>Thank you so much, you're a lifesaver!</size>
<size=38>Thank you so much, you're a lifesaver!</size>
<size=38>I'm sorry for taking up so much of your time…</size>
<size=38>I'm sorry for taking up so much of your time…</size>

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: A lifesaver!? You're exaggerating.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …But I'm really so glaaad. Keep working hard together with this fountain pen. I'll be rooting for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Buena Vista flashed a radiant smile, looking as happy as if she'd found it herself. Her deep kindness truly saved me.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Please don't apologize. I just didn't want you to lose something so important to you, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Hey, I'm just really glad you found it. That alone makes me incredibly happy, too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She was genuinely empathizing with me 
from the bottom of her heart――and the eyes that conveyed those feelings were endlessly pure and clear.
